name_cn:
🔥🔥🔥Black
A new backpack that captures the heart at first glance
Metal buckle and drawstring design
Inherently effortless and relaxed
Imported calfskin is premium and retro
Super spacious capacity, completely no burden
Whether paired with a coat or casual wear
It easily creates a stylish and casual look
The most worthy bag to buy this year, bar none!
Size: 23*12*26CM
